title: Laboratory of Computational Physics
text:
← Back to portal
The LCPA course is taught entirely through Jupyter notebooks, so there is no separate written companion. The full set of exercises, solutions, and lab material lives in the dedicated GitHub repository:
  Open the LCPA repository on GitHub
https://github.com/USERNAME/LCPA-projects
(The URL placeholder above is read from Notes/_projects_github.yml. Update that file once the repository is live and re-run ./render_all.sh.)
crumbs: 1  Laboratory of Computational Physics — Module A
